hypothesis: If CAST-based steering is applied to a frozen LLM during conditional molecular generation by adding property-specific steering vectors derived from a Concept Bottleneck Model to the model’s hidden activations, then the resulting molecules will achieve lower MAE (and Best100MAE) on target properties and higher novelty and synthesizability scores than vanilla LLM, ActAdd, full fine-tuning, or LoRA baselines across in-distribution and out-of-distribution property targets, because steering aligns generation with target properties via interpretable, orthogonal property embeddings.
